svg.text: QPSK carrier acquisition: phase-only versus 4th-power frequency help

text.tspan: The Costas loop can only clean up what the front end hands it.
A 4th-power frequency estimate widens that handoff range.

RMS distance to nearest QPSK corner

text.tspan: scatter = what the 4th-power front end hands the loop
